sections.paragraph:
(“father of help,” like the Germ. Adolf, from Atta, father, and Holf, aid), [Abiezer], pr.n.-

(1) a son of Gilead, Jos 17:2, and meton. of his descendants, Jud. 6:34 8:2 . The patronymic noun is אֲבִי הָעֶזְרִי [Abiezrite], Jud. 6:11 , 24 Jdg 6:24 8:32 . Hence is the shortened form אִיעֶזֶר, Num 26:30, and the patronym. אִיעֶזְרִי ibid.-(2) one of the heroes of David, 2Sa 23:27 1Ch 11:28 27:12 .
